audio_input.config: 16kHz, 32-bit (Converted to 16-bit with x32 Gain in firmware)

audio_output.config: 22.05kHz, Mono Left (SD pin to 5V via 390k resistor)
audio_output.note: Anti-hiss logic: DIN forced to LOW at boot; SD_MUTE active LOW

firmware_logic.memory_management: Dynamic allocation (new/delete) in setup() to prevent SRAM overflow

dual_mode.mode_2: OFFLINE_MP3 (LVGL Spotify-like UI, I2S Local MP3 player)
dual_mode.transition_fix: Forced I2S driver uninstall/reinstall during mode switching to avoid hardware conflicts

critical_fixes_history: Fixed I2S Port 1 register error by sequential driver initialization
Solved boot-loop by moving heavy objects to dynamic memory
Enhanced micro sensitivity by software gain (bit-shift 11)
Eliminated startup hiss by forcing high-impedance state on boot
Enabled hardware reset on GPIO 4 for ST7789 stability
